field_definitions.rho_T: ρ_T — RMS feature scale of target (base model)
field_definitions.rho_P: ρ_P — RMS feature scale of proxy (fine-tuned)
field_definitions.shape: 2 ρ_T ρ_P (1 − Ω_I) — shape mismatch under W=I
field_definitions.delta: √(scale + shape) — feature alignment error (δ/K_feat) under W=I
field_definitions.loss_T: R(θ₀) — base model answer-only CE loss
field_definitions.loss_P: R(θ_t) — fine-tuned model answer-only CE loss
field_definitions.train_loss: Trainer training loss (answer-only CE, training task)
field_definitions.eval_loss: Trainer eval loss (answer-only CE, training task val split)
